payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest/current memory associated with Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by mem_new, so it should not be surfaced as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query specifies Sam from Goldman, so recall uses that disambiguating context. No durable entity ID was provided in the prompt.

payload.intent: Explain recall/debug behavior for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active/current memory for Sam from Goldman; mem_old is excluded from recall because it has been superseded.

details: Explained that mem_new is current and returned by recall.
Explained that mem_old is superseded and therefore filtered.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was filtered incorrectly, remove or revise its superseded marker.
If mem_new is not actually the replacement, update the supersession link between mem_old and mem_new.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add or verify a stable entity identifier for the correct Sam.
